response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified performance by AZKi and IRyS throughout the video. 2. Identified '残酷な天使のテーゼ' (Zankoku na Tenshi no These) at 00:00 via on-screen text. Performer: Yoko Takahashi (Original), AZKi and IRyS (Cover). 3. Identified 'One Last Kiss' at 03:07 via on-screen text. Performer: Hikaru Utada (Original), AZKi and IRyS (Cover). 4. Performed searches for lyrics of both songs using their original Japanese titles and composers as keywords. Found accurate full lyrics for both. 5. Mapped scenes based on the transition between the two songs at 02:59. 6. Generated JSON structure.
response.global_summary: The video features a live concert performance by AZKi and IRyS, where they perform two songs: '残酷な天使のテーゼ' (A Cruel Angel's Thesis) and 'One Last Kiss'.

scenes.description: AZKi and IRyS perform '残酷な天使のテーゼ' on a lit-up stage with pink/blue visual effects. Text '残酷な天使のテーゼ' appears in the top-left corner.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
残酷な天使のように 少年よ神話になれ
蒼い風がいま 胸のドアを叩いても
私だけをただ見つめて 微笑んでるあなた
そっとふれるもの もとめることに夢中で
運命さえまだ知らない いたいけな瞳
だけどいつか気付くでしょう その背中には
遥か未来めざすための 羽根があること

残酷な天使のテーゼ 窓辺からやがて飛び立つ
ほとばしる熱いパトスで 思い出を裏切るなら
この宇宙を抱いて輝く 少年よ神話になれ

ずっと眠ってる 私の愛の揺りかご
あなただけが 夢の使者に 呼ばれる朝がくる
細い首筋を 月あかりが映してる
世界中の時を止めて 閉じこめたいけど

もしもふたり逢えたことに 意味があるなら
私はそう 自由を知るためのバイブル

残酷な天使のテーゼ 悲しみがそしてはじまる
抱きしめた命のかたち その夢に目覚めたとき
誰よりも光を放つ 少年よ神話になれ

人は愛をつむぎながら 歴史をつくる
女神なんてなれないまま 私は生きる

残酷な天使のテーゼ 窓辺からやがて飛び立つ
ほとばしる熱いパトスで 思い出を裏切るなら
この宇宙を抱いて輝く 少年よ神話になれ
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Like a cruel angel, young boy, become a myth.
Even if a blue wind strikes the door of my heart right now,
You, just staring at me and smiling,
Are absorbed in seeking something you gently touch.
With innocent eyes that don't even know fate yet,
But someday you will notice that on your back,
There are wings to aim for the distant future.

Cruel angel's thesis, you will eventually fly from the window,
If you betray your memories with the hot pathos gushing out,
Embrace this universe and shine, young boy, become a myth.

Always sleeping, the cradle of my love,
The morning will come when only you are called by the messenger of dreams,
The moonlight reflects on your slender neck,
I want to stop the time of the whole world and lock it up,

If there is meaning in the two of us meeting,
I am, indeed, the bible for knowing freedom.

Cruel angel's thesis, and then the sadness begins,
When you wake up from that dream, the shape of the life you embraced,
Releases more light than anyone, young boy, become a myth.

People spin love while creating history,
I live on without being able to become a goddess.

Cruel angel's thesis, you will eventually fly from the window,
If you betray your memories with the hot pathos gushing out,
Embrace this universe and shine, young boy, become a myth.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
My first time at the Louvre
was no big deal
because I'd already met
my own Mona Lisa, long ago
The day I first laid eyes on you
wheels began to turn
an unstoppable premonition of loss

We already have so many
but let's add another one
Can you give me one last kiss?
something we don't want to forget

Oh-oh-oh-oh, oh-woah, oh-oh-oh, oh-woah
Something I don't want to forget
Oh-oh-oh-oh, oh-woah, oh-oh-oh (oh-oh)
I love you more than you'll ever know, oh

"I don't like being photographed"
but I don't need such things
Your image is burnt forever
in my heart's projector screen
I was pretending I wasn't lonely
well, I guess that makes two of us
Yearning for someone
comes hand in hand with a heartache

Oh, can you give me one last kiss?
A kiss as hot as fire (ooh)
so passionately that even if I wanted to
I won't be able to forget it

Oh-oh-oh-oh, oh-woah, oh-oh-oh, oh-woah
I love you more than you'll ever know
Oh-oh-oh-oh, oh-woah, oh-oh-oh (oh-oh)
I love you more than you'll ever know, oh
I love you more than you'll ever know

that whether it's the end of the world
or if I grow up to be old...
someone I can't forget

someone I can't forget
